reach_why: Extends familiar concerns about recursive evaluation and selection bias, but does not open clearly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links loose equivalence, missing transition criteria, and pool contamination into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Testable if equivalence strictness, contamination, and reliability metrics are operationalized; currently underspecified.
explanation: Recursive systems can mimic progress by recycling coherent errors when standards and thresholds are poorly defined.
